% fig_lec08_parallel_transport.tex — Parallel transport along a curve on M
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec07_lec08.jl
%
% A curve C(t) on M = graph of h(x,y) = 0.5 cos(0.9 x) + 0.35 sin(0.6 y).
% Initial vector v(0) = (0.3, 0.8) in chart-α components at p = C(0).
% The Levi-Civita parallel-transport ODE  ċ^μ ∇_μ v = 0  is integrated
% along C; sample vectors are drawn at six equally-spaced t-points.

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
      width=10.0cm, height=6.2cm,
      view={-32}{34},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty,
      clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.30, shader=interp,
              colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot]
      table {data/lec07_surface.dat};

    % Curve C
    \addplot3[munsell, line width=1.3pt, no markers, forget plot]
      table {data/lec08_pt_curve_M.dat};

    % Transported vectors at sample t-points (Levi-Civita)
    \addplot3[
      quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
      -{Stealth[length=5pt, width=3.5pt]},
      banana!70!black, line width=1.0pt, no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec08_pt_vectors_lc.dat};

    % Endpoints p, q
    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.8pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec08_pt_endpoints.dat};

    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet]
      at (axis cs:-2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M$};
    \node[font=\small, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north west]
      at (axis cs:1.80,-0.50,-0.10) {$p$};
    \node[font=\small, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north east]
      at (axis cs:-2.20,-0.50,-0.10) {$q$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=munsell, anchor=west]
      at (axis cs:1.55,1.10,0.20) {$C$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!50!black, anchor=south]
      at (axis cs:-0.80,1.95,0.55) {$v^a$};
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
